/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/mpi_exec.dir/src/frame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpi_exec.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o mpi_exec  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_cxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
